SEARCH
Package Business

Class CartManager

java.lang.Object
Business.CartManager
public class CartManager extends Object
Represents the manager of the manager of the cart which helps with all its actions. This class manages a shopping cart and provides operations for adding, retrieving, and managing products.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CartManager()
    Constructs a new CartManager with an associated shopping cart.

    Description

    Removes all products from the shopping cart.

  • Constructor Details

    • CartManager

      public CartManager()
      Constructs a new CartManager with an associated shopping cart.

  • Method Details

    • addProductToCart

      public void addProductToCart(String productName, String productBrand, String productPrice, String shopName, String model)
      Adds a product to the shopping cart.
      Parameters:
      productName - The name of the product.
      productBrand - The brand of the product.
      productPrice - The price of the product as a string.
      shopName - The name of the shop where the product is added.
      model - The model of the shop.

    • getCartSize

      public int getCartSize()
      Gets the total number of products in the shopping cart.
      Returns:
      The size of the shopping cart.

    • getCartProductName

      public String getCartProductName(int comptadorCart)
      Gets the name of the product at the specified index in the shopping cart.
      Parameters:
      comptadorCart - The index of the product in the shopping cart.
      Returns:
      The name of the product.

    • getCartProductBrand

      public String getCartProductBrand(int comptadorCart)
      Gets the brand of the product at the specified index in the shopping cart.
      Parameters:
      comptadorCart - The index of the product in the shopping cart.
      Returns:
      The brand of the product.

    • getCartProductPrice

      public float getCartProductPrice(int comptadorCart)
      Gets the price of the product at the specified index in the shopping cart.
      Parameters:
      comptadorCart - The index of the product in the shopping cart.
      Returns:
      The price of the product.

    • removeCartProducts

      public void removeCartProducts()
      Removes all products from the shopping cart.

    • getMoneyForEachShop

      public ArrayList<Float> getMoneyForEachShop() throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Gets the total income for each shop in the shopping cart.
      Returns:
      A list of total income for each shop in the same order as shop names.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - if an error occurs while retrieving shop information.

    • initializeCartArrays

      public void initializeCartArrays() throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Initializes arrays and information needed for cart management.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - if an error occurs while retrieving shop information.

    • getShopsNames

      public ArrayList<String> getShopsNames()
      Gets the names of all unique shops in the shopping cart.
      Returns:
      A list of shop names without duplicates.

    • removeProductFromCart

      public void removeProductFromCart(String productName, String shopName)
      Removes a product from the cart based on the product and shop name. If shopName is null, it removes the product from all shops in the cart.
      Parameters:
      productName - The name of the product to remove.
      shopName - The name of the shop where the product is located, null for all shops.

    • getThresholdPriceIfNeed

      public boolean getThresholdPriceIfNeed(String shopName) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Checks if the threshold discount is required for a specific shop and activates it if necessary.
      Parameters:
      shopName - The name of the shop to check.
      Returns:
      true if the threshold discount is required and activated, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - if an error occurs while retrieving shop information.

    • getAlreadySaidShop

      public ArrayList<String> getAlreadySaidShop()
      Gets the list of shops where the threshold discount is activated.
      Returns:
      The list of shops where the threshold discount is activated.

    • addAlreadySaidShop

      public void addAlreadySaidShop(String shopName)
      Adds a shop to the list of shops where the threshold discount is activated.
      Parameters:
      shopName - The name of the shop to add.

    • getCartProductDiscountedPrice

      public float getCartProductDiscountedPrice(int compt) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Gets the discounted price of a product in the cart at a specific index.
      Parameters:
      compt - The index of the product in the cart.
      Returns:
      The discounted price of the product.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - if an error occurs while retrieving product or shop information.

    • activeThreshold

      public boolean activeThreshold(int compt, boolean comptSameBuy) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Checks if the loyalty threshold discount is active for a specific shop and purchase.
      Parameters:
      compt - The index of the shop in the cart.
      comptSameBuy - A boolean indicating if it's the same purchase for loyalty discount.
      Returns:
      true if the loyalty threshold discount is active, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - if an error occurs while retrieving shop information.

    • shopInThreshold

      public boolean shopInThreshold(int compt)
      Checks if a specific shop is in the threshold.
      Parameters:
      compt - The index of the shop in the cart.
      Returns:
      true if the shop is in the threshold, false otherwise.

    • getDiscounts

      public float getDiscounts(int compt) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Gets the product discount for a specific shop and product name.
      Parameters:
      compt - The index of the shop in the cart.
      Returns:
      The discount applied to the product.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - if an error occurs while retrieving product information.

    • setDiscountToShop

      public void setDiscountToShop(int comptShops)
      Sets the discount flag for a specific shop.
      Parameters:
      comptShops - The index of the shop in the cart.

    • getDiscountFromShop

      public boolean getDiscountFromShop(int comptShops)
      Gets the discount flag for a specific shop.
      Parameters:
      comptShops - The index of the shop in the cart.
      Returns:
      true if the shop has a discount, false otherwise.
